channel.title: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20's Adventuring Party on Dropout.tv

item.title: This is Aioli Energy
item.description:
The cast chat about their discoveries at the Ectic Research Station and no one feeds Lou aioli.

Duration: 38:47

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Hashtag Wealwell Challenge
item.description:
The cast reflect on their battle with the Fehujar and Lou eats a truly unnecessary amount of aioli.

Duration: 35:39

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Robot Equal Sexy or No?
item.description:
The cast chat Goldbeard's origins, sexy robots, and Olethra's love life.

Duration: 24:25

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: My Britches Are Normal Sized
item.description:
The cast chat about their recent discoveries, character guilt, and the new additions to the crew.

Duration: 19:40

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
